title: PULSE External Summary Envelope v1
description: Release-grade verification envelope for PULSE external summaries. This envelope binds a canonical external summary artifact to digest, signer, verification, and policy context. It does not create release authority.

envelope_id.description: Stable identifier for this external summary envelope.

uri.description: Path or URI to the canonical external summary artifact.

schema_version.description: Expected schema version of the wrapped external summary.

summary_id.description: Optional summary_id from the wrapped external summary.

algorithm.description: Digest algorithm used for the wrapped external summary artifact.

value.description: SHA-256 digest of the wrapped external summary artifact.

mode.description: Signing or attestation mode used for the external summary.

identity.description: Signer identity, workflow identity, KMS identity, or explicit unsigned identity marker.

issuer.description: Optional OIDC issuer, certificate issuer, or trust domain.

bundle_uri.description: Path or URI to signature, attestation, or transparency bundle.

certificate_subject.description: Optional certificate subject or identity claim.

verified.description: Whether signature / attestation verification succeeded before release-decision fold-in.

verified_at.description: UTC timestamp when verification was performed.

version.description: Verifier tool version, commit, or stable label.

signer_policy_ref.description: Path, URI, or key identifying the signer policy used for verification.

threshold_policy_ref.description: Optional path, URI, or key identifying the threshold policy used by the summary.

release_contribution.description: Declared contribution mode for the wrapped external summary.

fold_in_allowed.description: Whether the verified envelope is allowed to be folded into release evidence under declared policy. If true, verification.verified must also be true.

authority_boundary.const: This external summary envelope does not define release authority. It records digest, signer, verification, and policy context for external evidence before any policy-controlled fold-in to status.json.

extensions.description: Optional non-normative extension fields for environment-specific verification metadata.
